calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim (Minor)
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Cliam of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: S. Wong #11288.

Teddy Tsao-Wu, Esq. appeared with petitioner Long Van Tran, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor claimant Nghiem Hao Tran.
Petitioner was placed under oath and direct examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $22,650.00
Attorney's Fees - $5,662.50
Medical Expenses - $4,444.88
The net balance of $12,542.62 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of the West, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Counsel will prepared an Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, with an Order to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
